home_intro:
Congrats on finding this place <3 

I'm Kinne, a guy who's into way too many things XD

I have a huge passion for Anime, Manga, Light Novels, Visual Novels, gacha games, AAA games, and a dozen more hobbies on top of that:
3D, vibe coding, design, drawing too, and so on, but I've never mastered any of them 🥀
home_sub: I also love going to fests and looking at the cute cosplayers, but I live somewhere with very few fests, so I don't get many chances to see them <(")
home_welcome:
"this place is my home, holding pretty much everything you could know about me — maybe a few memories?, the projects I've worked on, and even the ones I've planned but have no idea when they'll be finished =))

take your time and enjoy, the way forward is on your right"
gallery_hint: This is where I share my own works, they're not that pretty but I really love them
gallery_note: I don't have much here right now (honestly I don't even know where the rest of my photos went <(") ), so it's just a few things for now, I'll add more later hehe
music_hint: This is where I keep the songs I love the most, feel free to check if they match your taste
film_hint: This is every Anime I've watched. I also love reading Manga, Light Novels, and Visual Novels, but since I haven't read as many of those as Anime, this list only covers films :P
